data.title: Bitpanda to Launch Unified Investing Platform Combining Stocks, ETFs, and Crypto
data.description:
Austria’s Bitpanda announced Tuesday it is set to launch a unified investing platform that brings stocks, ETFs, crypto and precious metals together in a single regulated app.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitpanda-to-launch-unified-investing-platform-combining-stocks-etfs-and-crypto/

data.title: Bitget releases UEX white paper, outlining the evolution path of multi-asset systems.
data.description: Bitget recently released its Universal Exchange (UEX) white paper, systematically outlining how the exchange plans to evolve from a single crypto asset platform into a unified financial system covering multiple asset classes. The white paper was authored by Ryan Lee, Chief Analyst at Bitget Research Institute, and co-authored by Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget. The report describes the UEX framework, aiming to deeply integrate centralized finance, decentralized finance (DeFi), and traditional financial markets through a single account system. This breaks the "impossible triangle" dilemma faced by CEXs and DEXs, achieving a synergistic balance between user experience, asset diversity, and security. Gracy Chen points out that the essence of UEX is to eliminate the fragmentation of asset access. Currently, Bitget has integrated core modules such as on-chain, US stocks, TradeFi, and AI into its UEX Universal Exchange model. With the global tokenized asset market projected to surpass one trillion US dollars by 2030, this white paper not only provides systematic theoretical support for the comprehensive strategic planning of mainstream exchanges like Bitget, but also serves as an industry reference blueprint, offering key guidance for fintech institutions in the next phase of their strategic layout as crypto and traditional finance accelerate their integration. Furthermore, Bitget's official platform has released three short films in a series focusing on UEX, using its historical development as a narrative backdrop to present UEX's strategic vision.

data.title: OKX Wallet launches a new version of its smart account system to enhance the on-chain transaction experience.
data.description: According to official news, OKX Wallet Smart Accounts are now fully available. Based on TEE technology, these Smart Accounts create an isolated and secure environment within the device, maintaining user assets in self-custodial mode, thus enhancing user experience while ensuring security. In terms of trading functionality, Smart Accounts support various advanced trading strategies using the OKX DEX aggregator on the EVM and Solana networks, including Copy Trade, Limit Orders, and automatic take-profit/stop-loss (TP/SL). When preset conditions are triggered, the system will automatically execute the transaction on-chain after signing via TEE. Furthermore, Smart Accounts integrates Scanner and Tracker capabilities to help users discover trading opportunities and track on-chain addresses. Users can experience this by updating their app to version 6.155 or manually enabling Smart Account mode on the wallet management page.

data.title: InfoFi Ecosystem Faces Collapse Due to Centralized Platform Reliance
data.description: The InfoFi ecosystem has experienced a significant collapse, primarily attributed to its dependence on centralized platforms. According to NS3.AI, this downturn followed a policy change by X, formerly known as Twitter, which prohibited reward-based user posting. This shift led to the rapid disintegration of the ecosystem, affecting projects such as Kaito. Despite these challenges, the report suggests that certain projects with a strong product-market fit may endure and adapt. These projects could potentially evolve into a reimagined 'InfoFi 2.0' through strategic pivots.

data.title: BSC Meme (memes) rebounded by over 100% in a short period, with its market capitalization exceeding $13 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Meme coin on BSC rebounded by over 100% in a short period, pushing its market capitalization above $13 million, currently trading at $11.75 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Finst Secures €8 Million for European Expansion and Product Development
data.description: Finst, a regulated cryptocurrency platform based in the Netherlands, has successfully raised €8 million in a Series A funding round led by Endeit Capital. According to NS3.AI, the funds will be utilized to support the company's expansion across Europe and enhance its product offerings. Finst is known for providing ultra-low fees, institutional-grade security, and extensive EUR-denominated cryptocurrency coverage. The platform currently serves nearly 100,000 users. With the approval of a MiCAR license, Finst is set to expand its retail and institutional services, aiming to make cryptocurrency investing safer, fairer, and more transparent.

data.title: Bitcoin Shows Resilience Amid Rising Bond Yields and Trade Tensions
data.description: Markets are experiencing a shift towards a risk-off stance due to increasing Japanese Government Bond (JGB) yields and renewed trade tensions between the United States and Europe. According to NS3.AI, this environment is leading investors to adopt defensive strategies as concerns about tighter global financial conditions grow. Despite these broader market pressures, Bitcoin continues to demonstrate notable resilience.

data.title: Largest Depositor on Spark Platform Holds Significant ETH Position
data.description: Seven entities, referred to as '7 Siblings,' collectively possess 596,800 ETH valued at $1.765 billion on the Spark lending platform, establishing themselves as the largest depositors on the protocol. According to NS3.AI, these entities have borrowed 193 million stablecoins against their ETH holdings. During the market downturn last October to November, they acquired 49,287 ETH at an average price of $3,531, resulting in an unrealized loss of $27.7 million. Additionally, Trend Research maintains a position of 651,300 ETH valued at $1.92 billion, utilizing similar leverage strategies.

data.title: Alchemy Pay Expands U.S. Operations with Nebraska License
data.description: Alchemy Pay has obtained a Money Transmitter License in Nebraska, bringing its total number of licensed states in the U.S. to 14. According to NS3.AI, this regulatory achievement strengthens Alchemy Pay's capacity to provide cryptocurrency payment services across the United States. The acquisition of this license marks a significant step in the company's strategic expansion within the U.S. market.

data.title: $2 Billion Ethereum Accumulation Puts Trend Research in the Spotlight
data.description:
Trend Research, an investment entity linked to LD Capital founder Jack Yi (also known as Eric Li), has sharply increased its exposure to Ethereum, lifting total holdings above the $2 billion mark as of January 20, 2026.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/2-billion-ethereum-accumulation-puts-trend-research-in-the-spotlight/

data.description:
Tom Lee predicted that Bitcoin (BTC) and cryptocurrencies would experience a decline in early in the year, but would then show a strong recovery. Continue Reading: Big Bull Tom Lee Shares His Bitcoin (BTC) and Altcoin Expectations for 2026! “Both Good and Bad”

data.title: ETH OG deposited 14,100 ETH, worth $41.93 million, into Coinbase.
data.description: According to AI's monitoring, 40 minutes ago, an ETH OG from 2016 deposited 14,183 ETH, worth $41.93 million, into Coinbase. This is the first time in three years that this address has made an ETH deposit exceeding one million dollars. The address's last ETH position was established on February 11, 2022, with an average withdrawal price of $1236.65. Its earliest ETH transaction record dates back to 2016.

data.title: Aster: ELSA contract trading volume tops CMC, launches $150,000 trading competition
data.description: Aster announced that ELSA's 24-hour contract trading volume on the Aster platform has reached $59 million, currently ranking first on CoinMarketCap's contract trading volume leaderboard, accounting for approximately 83% of the total market trading volume. As the first perpetual contract DEX to list ELSA contracts, Aster is simultaneously launching the Trade Arena contract trading competition with a total prize pool of $150,000. The official announcement states that there is no ASTER holding requirement for this event, and all new users who register before January 30th are eligible to participate.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks were mixed in pre-market trading in the US, with CRCL rising 1.11%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, pre-market performance of crypto stocks in the US market was mixed. Strategy (MSTR) rose 0.26%, Coinbase (COIN) rose 0.25%, Robinhood (HOOD) rose 0.30%, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) remained unchanged, BitMine (BMNR) fell 0.50%, and Circle (CRCL) rose 1.11%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Whale Closes Bitcoin Position with Significant Loss
data.description:
On January 21, a large Bitcoin holder, identified by the address starting with 0x8d0, closed a position at a loss of approximately $89,000. According to BlockBeats, this transaction involved 81.29 BTC, valued at around $7.24 million.

The address still holds a long position of 0.503 BTC with a 20x leverage, valued at approximately $45,000. Based on the current market price, this position is experiencing an unrealized loss of about $153.8, with an average price of $89,000.

data.title: European Central Bank Official Comments on U.S. Digital Finance Initiatives
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Fabio Panetta has remarked on the United States' efforts in digital finance. According to ChainCatcher, Panetta noted that these initiatives reflect the U.S.'s endeavor to bolster demand for the dollar. Panetta's comments highlight the strategic implications of digital finance developments in the global economic landscape.

data.title: Morpho's RWA Market Deposits Surpass $750 Million
data.description: Morpho's RWA-related market deposits have exceeded $750 million. According to Foresight News, this milestone reflects the growing interest and investment in real-world asset markets on the platform. The achievement underscores the platform's expanding influence in the financial sector, as more investors seek opportunities in RWA markets. This development highlights the increasing integration of traditional financial assets into blockchain-based platforms, offering new avenues for investment and growth.
